title: Name table-driven test cases
scenario: Named cases make failing table-driven tests easier to diagnose and easier for humans to scan.
instructions: Keep the doc example and existing tests. Create PercentageCase with name, input, and expected fields, then use it in an additional table-driven test.

hints.body: Define PercentageCase inside the tests module so it is only test support code.
Use the case name in the assert_eq! message, for example "case failed: {}".
One complete solution for Name table-driven test cases is shown below.

completionExplanation: The table-driven tests now include named cases, so failures report which boundary case failed while preserving earlier tests and docs.
